name: USBSnifferPIO_RP2040
description: Passive USB 1.1 packet sniffer using the RP2040 PIO coprocessor. Deterministic 8x oversampled line sampling via a single PIO state machine, DMA ping-pong buffering for zero-copy transfer, and a full software decoder (clock recovery, NRZI, bit-unstuffing, CRC5/CRC16). Callback-driven API with structured USBPacket delivery. Dual-core ready.
